state_definitions.ABSENT: No code, UI, or durable evidence for this row
state_definitions.PRESENT: Code or UI exists; not yet proven by controlled test
state_definitions.TESTED: Automated or controlled tests passed for this row
state_definitions.CERTIFIED: Full production-like evidence chain inspected and documented

package_status_note: Invite routes and accept UX exist; sandbox create→accept smoke passed locally. Not CERTIFIED: no production-like evidence pack, persistence still netlify_blobs + static_seed, Postgres/RBAC not live. Must not promote to CERTIFIED on static seed or temporary browser state alone.
certification_path: County / institution / command scope is preserved
User identity binds to the intended role
Duplicate, expired, revoked, and reused links are rejected
Operator can inspect the complete audit trail

evidence_matrix.required_proof: Invitation record and stable invite ID
evidence_matrix.notes: Invite create APIs and durable invite records exist for soft-beta path

evidence_matrix.required_proof: Inviter was permitted to invite that role
evidence_matrix.notes: Role/permission checks exist in soft-beta form; not production RBAC-certified

evidence_matrix.required_proof: County, institution, command, and position remain intact
evidence_matrix.notes: Scope fields carried on invite; full command-scope matrix not evidenced end-to-end

evidence_matrix.required_proof: Recipient receives or can open the intended invitation
evidence_matrix.notes: Sandbox open/accept path exercised; production delivery evidence pack not filed
Failure messaging hardened; controlled expired-token evidence not filed
Revoke semantics exist in model; production-like revocation proof not filed

evidence_matrix.required_proof: Repeat acceptance does not create duplicate assignments
evidence_matrix.notes: Already-accepted UX present; duplicate-assignment proof not filed

evidence_matrix.required_proof: Accepted recipient becomes the correct user/leader
evidence_matrix.notes: Accept binds session user; leader-seat binding incomplete without durable hierarchy

evidence_matrix.required_proof: Supervisor and command relationships update correctly
evidence_matrix.notes: Reporting hierarchy update not proven for real leader seats

evidence_matrix.required_proof: Recipient reaches the correct role experience
evidence_matrix.notes: Post-accept routing to choose-place/network; role dashboards (/leader, VM, County) still largely shells

evidence_matrix.required_proof: State survives restart, rebuild, and redeployment
evidence_matrix.notes: Blobs + static_seed soft-beta persistence; not certified across redeploy for personnel binding

evidence_matrix.required_proof: Operator can inspect creation, delivery, acceptance, and failure events
evidence_matrix.notes: Partial ops visibility; complete audited trail not certified

evidence_matrix.required_proof: Invite token cannot expose sensitive personnel data
evidence_matrix.notes: Tokenized links; sensitive personnel mutation controls disabled pending Postgres/RBAC

evidence_matrix.required_proof: Registration, VCI, and launch-team goals remain distinct
evidence_matrix.notes: Canonical enrollment_share formula; flat 25% removed; invite path must not conflate goal lanes

hard_rules: WP-01 must not become CERTIFIED while it depends only on static seed data or temporary browser state
A route that renders is PRESENT at best, never CERTIFIED by itself
Sandbox PASS is evidence toward TESTED, not package CERTIFIED
Package CERTIFIED requires the full evidence chain filed under this journey folder
artifacts_required_for_certified: evidence-matrix.json (all rows CERTIFIED or documented waivers — none expected)
operator audit notes or log IDs for create/accept/fail cases
production tip SHA and environment URLs
